suggested_response: Dear valued customer, we're sorry to hear that your recent flight with us didn't meet your expectations. We'll be reaching out to our Cabin Crew leadership and In-flight Catering team to investigate the issues you faced with boarding, entertainment, and food. We will be reaching out to you via private message to gather more details so that we can investigate this matter thoroughly and improve our services.
strategic_steps: Reach out to Cabin Crew leadership
Private message customer for more information
